Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is the first time we've talked during the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Isn't this weather lovely? This really is the start of a new day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}All the fragments of my memory are finally back together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I understand my purpose now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I know this is going to hurt, but there's something I have to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}This is goodbye... for you and me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}In my eyes, our friendship was a miracle. I want you to know that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But even miracles don't last forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Even if eternity does exist, how would we ever know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It'd be no different than if it didn't exist.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What's most important is the experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I'll always treasure the time we had together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Today may be the end, but the bond between us can never be severed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pharos is looking at me with teary eyes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a strong bond[n]between Pharos and me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Death Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Thanatos{f 0 1 27}, the bringer of death![n]{f 1 1}
